title: Architectural Grid System

core_principle.statement: The grid is the structural skeleton of all visual, spatial, and digital representations of the brand.
core_principle.interpretation: Every design output must follow a predefined engineering grid logic to ensure system consistency and architectural discipline.

grid_foundation.unit_definition: Each cell represents a structural unit of architectural logic
grid_foundation.scalability: Grid must scale proportionally across all formats (UI, print, logo, motion)

grid_structure_layers.description: Main structural framework defining composition and layout
Subdivision system for detailed architectural refinement
Hidden alignment system for advanced system consistency

grid_behavior_rules.alignment_rule: All elements must snap to grid intersections
grid_behavior_rules.consistency_rule: No freeform positioning allowed outside grid logic
grid_behavior_rules.spacing_rule: All spacing must be derived from grid unit multiples
grid_behavior_rules.hierarchy_rule: Visual hierarchy must follow grid-based positioning

layout_system_logic.organization_principle: Information is structured like an architectural blueprint
layout_system_logic.balance_rule: Negative space is treated as architectural space, not empty area

typography_integration.rule: Typography must align strictly to grid lines
typography_integration.baseline_system: Baseline grid aligned with 8px spacing unit

visual_application.logo_system: All logo elements must align to grid geometry
visual_application.ui_system: UI components must be built on grid modules
visual_application.print_system: Catalog and documentation layouts must follow grid hierarchy
visual_application.motion_system: Animation paths must respect grid structure logic

forbidden_behaviors: Breaking alignment rules for aesthetic purposes
Ignoring spacing ratios derived from grid units

user_feeling: This is an engineering-level design language

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure all visual outputs behave like architectural blueprints
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent perception of AvizSazeh as a structured engineering system brand
